key.description: Finnworlds API key, sent as the 'key' query parameter on every request. Never logged.

base_url.description: Finnworlds API base URL override for tests or proxies.

tickers.description: Comma-separated list of stock ticker symbols to fan out over for the dividends, stock_splits, and historical_candlestick streams. Required for those three streams (no auto-discovery fallback); the commodities stream is unaffected.

commodities.description: Comma-separated list of commodity names to fan out over for the commodities stream. Required for that stream (no auto-discovery fallback).
